description_long: This is a vintage black firefighter's helmet, constructed with a hard, domed shell and a wide, slightly upturned brim. The helmet features prominent raised ridges running from the front to the back, providing structural reinforcement and a classic firefighter style. There are four yellow-tinted, shield-shaped reflective panels set into the sides, which are weathered and show signs of age and use. The front of the helmet displays a leather shield with the number '26' and the words 'INDIANAPOLIS', as well as a name or label 'PEGLOW' written in white on the brim. The surface is scuffed, scratched, and bears marks of heavy use, with some metal hardware and a chin strap visible on the sides.
description: A weathered black firefighter's helmet with yellow reflective panels, a leather front shield, and visible signs of heavy use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the leather shield, 'PEGLOW' label on the brim, and two yellow reflective panels.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the curved brim, two yellow panels, and the chin strap hardware.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the leather shield with '26' and 'INDIANAPOLIS', and the helmet's ridged structure.
description_view_3: Right side view showing two yellow panels, the edge of the front shield, and more scuff marks.
attribute_graphic_design: Handwritten white text 'PEGLOW' on the brim, yellow reflective panels, and a leather front shield with '26' and 'INDIANAPOLIS'.
